description_long: This is a pair of rectangular, semi-rimless eyeglasses with a sleek, modern design. The frame is thin and black, with the upper portion of the lenses encased in the frame while the lower edges are left exposed. The temples are straight and slender, featuring a subtle bend near the ear tips for a secure fit. The lenses are lightly tinted gray, providing a neutral and understated appearance. Adjustable nose pads are present, enhancing comfort and fit for the wearer. The overall style is minimalist and functional, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: Rectangular, semi-rimless black eyeglasses with gray-tinted lenses and thin, straight temples.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular lenses, semi-rimless frame, and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin, straight temple and the semi-rimless lens edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inner side of the frame, temples, and nose pads.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the straight temple and the exposed lower lens edge.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, semi-rimless frame with a thin, minimalist upper rim and exposed lower lens edges. The temples are straight and slender, with a gentle curve at the ends for ear comfort. The overall style is modern and understated, with no visible embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are lightly tinted gray, offering a neutral, semi-transparent appearance without any gradient or mirrored effect.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, thin bar connecting the lenses, equipped with adjustable nose pads for comfort and fit.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin, straight, and unadorned, with a slight bend at the tips for secure placement behind the ears. No visible patterns or engravings are present.
